text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While working out a training schedule to make the most of summer
camp...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I have a favor to ask.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
These two hours after training on this day—no, two to three
hours—could we keep this time slot open?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: And, just to clarify, I mean for both of us.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I have some... plans, yes. And I, um... I just need you to be there.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Would you be willing to help out?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not like her to be so vague. She looks a bit nervous, though, so I
decide not to prod and give her the okay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp begins, and we train according to schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes... Thank you. And, um...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You've remembered to keep two to three hours open after this...
right?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Right, then please meet me at the shrine in an hour and thirty-five
minutes. I need to get ready, so I'll meet you there. Bye, for now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: An hour and thirty-five minutes later, I head to the shrine.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Right on time. I can always count on you to be punctual.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Not right now, no. Trainer, are you fond of festivals?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The summer festival's very lively, isn't it? And also... full of delicious
aromas.
choice_data_list: So this is the big thing you were planning.
So this is the big thing you were planning.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It was my roommate who told me that there'd be a traditional summer
festival near the training camp.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I've been curious about Japanese festivals ever since coming here.
And, fortunately, we had some time after training today, so...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Well, it's not that I was trying to hide it. It's just, I wasn't sure when
to tell you, and kept putting it off.
choice_data_list: Gotta say, I'm kind of surprised.
Gotta say, I'm kind of surprised.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Surprised... that I'd be interested in festivals? My roommate also said
as much.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Or, to give a proper quote, "You don't seem like the noisy
festival-goer type."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: However, in Germany we have Karnevals, which involve much more noise than this festival. They're wild fun, really.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
During the event, everyone is free to laugh and get intoxicated by
the festive mood—I don't mind it, actually.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And so, since summer festivals are such a wonderful part of Japanese
culture, I put it in my schedule to enjoy one to the fullest. Come on
then, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Did you know we have candy apples in Germany too? Holiday
markets even have blue apples.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Ah... They're doing a festival dance over there. What a fascinating
piece of culture.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They all look like they're having so much fun—hm? Wait, are they...
waving to us? Does that mean...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huh? T-Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We get swept up in the festive mood and are thoroughly enjoying
ourselves, when...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh no, I lost track of the time!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The fireworks will begin three minutes from now. If we don't hurry...
No, the probability of making it on time is too low.
choice_data_list: You can't see them from here?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Well, you can, but according to what I found, you can't see all of
them.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So, I found a better spot about ten minutes from here. If I ran at a jog,
I'd probably get there in time, but...
choice_data_list: Then what are we waiting for?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: But you...
choice_data_list:
All that matters is that you get to enjoy the
fireworks!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I forgot my most important goal for the day.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We don't need to move. Change of plans, we'll watch the fireworks
from here.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm sure. See, the—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Just then, the shrill whistling of fireworks cuts her off.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Wunderschön... It's so... beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I think this is the best spot after all. Here, I get to accomplish my
initial goal...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: "Having fun with you." That was my top priority for the day.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: And I'm... having a lot of fun right now. Are you?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'm happy too—properly happy.
